item.title: Senior home wealth just hit a record high. Here's how to borrow from it now.
item.description: Senior home wealth hit a record high earlier this year. Here's how seniors can borrow that money right now.

item.title: GLP-1s are linked to a 17% drop in worker sick leave, new study finds
item.description: Here's how weight-loss drugs like Ozempic and Wegovy could reduce worker illness and save companies money.

item.title: Trump meets with Lebanon's President Aoun over Iran war and Israel's attacks on Hezbollah
item.description: President Trump met Tuesday with Lebanese President Joseph Aoun at the White House to discuss the war in Iran, Hezbollah and Israel. CBS News' Nancy Cordes reports.

item.title: Watch: Trump talks Iran operation while taking questions with Lebanese President Joseph Aoun
item.description: President Trump and Lebanese President Joseph Aoun took questions in the Oval Office on Tuesday, where Mr. Trump spoke about the U.S. strikes against Iran. CBS News' Aaron Navarro has more.

item.title: How much interest can a $15,000 short-term CD account earn if opened this July?
item.description: Interest earnings on a CD of this size and length can be substantial and available relatively quickly for savers.

item.title: United investigates after employee appears to threaten to call ICE on passenger
item.description: United Airlines is investigating after video captured a confrontation between one of their employees and a passenger last week in San Francisco. The United agent appears to threaten the passenger with a call to ICE. CBS News' Kris Van Cleave reports.

item.title: Mike Johnson urges lawmakers to pass the SAVE America Act before monthlong recess
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson pushed for lawmakers to pass the controversial SAVE America Act before the monthlong congressional recess begins July 27. CBS News' Nikole Killion has more.

item.title: Timeline of explosion outside New York City federal building
item.description: A veteran was arrested for allegedly setting off fireworks and starting a fire in front of a Manhattan building that houses several federal offices, including ICE, the FBI says. CBS News' Anna Schecter shares more details.

item.title: Sam Mewis on countdown to the 2027 FIFA Women's World Cup
item.description: Former U.S. Women's National Team member Sam Mewis, now editor-in-chief and host of "The Women's Game" podcast, joins CBS News 24/7 Mornings to recap the Men's FIFA World Cup and look ahead to the 2027 FIFA Women's World Cup in Brazil.

item.title: Cocaine worth $285 million found hidden in banana shipment
item.description: Some 1,700 pounds of cocaine was concealed in a refrigerated container from Ecuador among dozens of pallets of bananas, police said.

item.title: Taco Bell reports drop in foot traffic amid cyclosporiasis outbreak, probe continues into source
item.description: The FDA continues to hunt for the source of the cyclosporiasis outbreak, though it says its investigation "continue to converge on shredded iceberg lettuce from Taylor Farms locations in central Mexico." Fast food giant Taco Bell, which uses shredded lettuce in some products, has seen declining foot traffic as some Americans avoid raw produce. CBS News' Carter Evans reports.

item.title: The impact of U.S. service member injuries in the Middle East
item.description: Retired U.S. Army major and military analyst Mike Lyons joins CBS News 24/7 Mornings to discuss an exclusive CBS News report that nearly 100 service members were injured in the Middle East in the last month.

item.title: How much wealth you need to thrive based on your age
item.description: Three in four American households lack the wealth to weather financial setbacks and achieve major life milestones.

item.title: Iran attacks U.S. allies as 3 American soldiers killed in escalating war
item.description: Iran attacks Bahrain, Kuwait, Jordan and a ship in the Strait of Hormuz as at least 3 U.S. forces are killed and dozens wounded in the escalating conflict.

item.title: HVAC extended warranties and service plans: What's actually worth paying for?
item.description: Not every HVAC protection plan delivers value. Here's how to tell which options are worth paying extra for.

item.title: Man attacked by bison recalls terrifying encounter: "He could have gored me"
item.description: Carl Isom-McDaniel was on a walk with his grandson at Yellowstone National Park earlier this month when a bison suddenly charged at him and threw him 8 feet into the air.

item.title: Video appears to show United employee threatening to call ICE on customer
item.description: A United Airlines employee appears to have been caught on video threatening to call ICE on a passenger last week at San Francisco International Airport.

item.title: Deadly attack on U.S. forces in Jordan part of evolving Iranian tactics
item.description: A retired Jordanian general tells CBS News Iran is "developing techniques and capacities" to target U.S. forces with increasing lethality.

item.title: Hegseth, Caine to testify before Senate panel amid escalating Iran war
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and Gen. Dan Caine, chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, will testify before a Senate committee amid escalations in the war with Iran in recent days.

item.title: Trump admin. halts $1 billion in Medicaid payments to California, Minnesota
item.description: Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. said his agency is pausing $867.5 million in Medicaid payments to California and $199 million to Minnesota.

item.title: Key Arizona primaries to watch today
item.description: Arizona has traditionally been a red state, and six of its nine House representatives are Republicans.

item.title: U.S. soldier killed in Iraq identified as 30-year-old from North Carolina
item.description: Sgt. Michael Emmanuel Swinton, 30, of North Carolina, was "decommissioning ammunition and an accident happened," Secretary of State Marco Rubio said.

item.title: Woman attacked by bear while hiking with friend and dogs in Alaska
item.description: A woman suffered injuries after being attacked by a brown bear in southern Alaska, where she was out hiking with a friend and three dogs, authorities said.

item.title: What's in Republicans' $95 billion budget resolution?
item.description: The Republicans' budget resolution includes $60 billion for the Pentagon, $13 billion for national intelligence, $12 billion in farm assistance and $10 billion for elections, including grants for states adopting President Trump's stricter voter ID laws. CBS News' Bradley Blackburn breaks it down.

item.title: Facing a debt collection lawsuit? Here's what to do in the next 30 days.
item.description: A debt collection lawsuit doesn't have to catch you off guard. Here's how to protect yourself in the first 30 days.

item.title: Tropical Storm Bertha strengthens, threatening Gulf Coast. See its path.
item.description: Tropical Storm Bertha is the second named storm of the Atlantic hurricane season.

item.title: Tropical Storm Bertha threatens Gulf Coast with flooding and storm surge
item.description: Tropical Storm Bertha formed on Monday, threatening the Gulf Coast. Meanwhile in the Midwest, severe storms caused flooding in Des Moines, Iowa, and several tornadoes were spotted in northern Wisconsin. Lana Zak reports.

item.title: U.S. hits Iran with strikes for 10th night amid reports of injured service members
item.description: The U.S. struck Iran for a tenth night as CBS News reports that nearly 100 service members have been injured on multiple bases in the Middle East this month. CBS News' Charlie D'Agata and Aaron Navarro have more.

item.title: Ford recalls nearly 388,000 vehicles over seat issue
item.description: The recall affects certain 2020-2027 Aviator and 2020-2026 Explorer vehicles.

item.title: Cat pulled from Venezuela quake rubble as death toll tops 5,200
item.description: A weakened cat was pulled from under the rubble of a collapsed residential complex in what a rescuer described as a "ray of hope."
